name: codex-comment-checker
description: Run comment-checker after Codex apply_patch edits.

interface.longDescription: Codex Comment Checker runs the native comment-checker after successful apply_patch tool calls and feeds warnings back to Codex through PostToolUse hook feedback.
defaultPrompt: Explain the comment warning from the apply_patch hook.
Fix the comment-checker warning from my last patch.
Show why the apply_patch comment check blocked.
